subcodes.first_line: O Mustafa! Blessed art thou, inasmuch as thou hast won the splendors of the Countenance, attained the presence of the Cause, and art numbered among them that have triumphed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا مصطفی طوبی لک بما فزت بانوار الوجه و حضرت محضر الامر و کنت من الفائزین
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
